heading: Relationship to other laws
label: 31146 Relationship to other laws
text: Except as provided in , this subchapter and the regulations prescribed under this subchapter do not affect chapter 51 of this title or a regulation prescribed under chapter 51.section 31136(b) of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3114649 App.:2518., , .Oct. 30, 1984Pub. L. 98–554, § 22198 Stat. 2846
